data.name: BundleExport_Heading
data.value: Export profiles, configurations and routing lists

data.name: BundleExport_PrivateKeyWarning
data.value: ⚠ The exported file contains configuration private keys. Store and share it securely.

data.name: BundleExport_RoutingRulesHint
data.value: Uncheck rules you don't want to include (e.g. machine-specific apps).

data.name: BundleImport_Heading
data.value: Import profiles, configurations and routing lists

data.name: BundleImport_PayloadWatermark
data.value: Paste the bundle JSON (Ctrl+V) or pick a file with the “Choose file…” button

data.name: BundleImport_SecurityWarning
data.value: ⚠ The imported file may contain private configuration keys — use files from trusted sources only.

data.name: ConfigEditor_Hint
data.value: wg-quick text (.conf). It must contain [Interface] and [Peer] sections.

data.name: Main_AddEntryLabel
data.value: ADD AN ENTRY (GEO CATEGORY, DOMAIN OR CIDR)

data.name: Main_AllUdpHint
data.value: Routes ALL outgoing UDP datagrams into the tunnel while selective routing is active. Needed for real-time media (voice calls, online games) whose server addresses arrive via signaling rather than DNS. The local network and the tunnel channel itself are excluded.

data.name: Main_AutoCheckHint
data.value: Periodically check sources for a new version and notify.

data.name: Main_BundleHint
data.value: Select profiles, configurations, and routing lists to transfer to another device, or import a previously exported file.

data.name: Main_CacheValidityHint
data.value: After how long the data is considered stale and refreshed in the background. Manual «Update all» always checks.

data.name: Main_ChooseProfileToSetup
data.value: CHOOSE A PROFILE TO SET UP

data.name: Main_ClearRulesTooltip
data.value: Delete all entries in the list

data.name: Main_ConfEditHint
data.value: It must have [Interface] and [Peer] sections. The profile's geo and routes are preserved.

data.name: Main_ConfigEditButtonTooltip
data.value: Enter / edit the configuration text in the large editor

data.name: Main_DeleteConfigHint
data.value: Remove the configuration from the catalogue. The agent will refuse while it is used by any profile or a running tunnel — unlink it first.

data.name: Main_DeleteProfileHint
data.value: The profile is deleted together with its settings. A running profile must be disconnected first.

data.name: Main_PendingDeleteHint
data.value: Marked for deletion. Press Save to delete, or Cancel to keep it.

data.name: Main_ConfigInUse
data.value: Cannot delete: the configuration is used by profiles:

data.name: Main_RoutingInUse
data.value: Cannot delete: the routing list is used by profiles:

data.name: Main_ProfileInUse
data.value: Cannot delete: the profile is connected. Disconnect it first.

data.name: Main_DnsHint
data.value: DNS for ordinary (non-tunnel) traffic. Several — comma-separated. Empty — detect automatically. Geo domains are resolved via a separate clean DNS.

data.name: Main_ExclusionsHint
data.value: Addresses not to route into the VPN. One per line. An IP/subnet goes directly, bypassing the tunnel; a domain is resolved via the local DNS (goes directly only if the address is local).

data.name: Main_GeoDismissTooltip
data.value: Later - you can update it in settings

data.name: Main_GeoKindsHint
data.value: geosite - domain categories, geoip - countries. The file is downloaded immediately. The ⟳ icon updates a database, «Update all» - all at once; right-click a database - delete.

data.name: Main_LogEmptyHint
data.value: The log will appear once the agent starts working.

data.name: Main_LogVerbosityHint
data.value: «Trace» records every connection step and timing - for support diagnosis.

data.name: Main_MtuHint
data.value: 576-1500, default 1280 (safe for almost any network). On a clean link you can raise it to 1420 for speed; if the TLS handshake still stalls - lower it further.

data.name: Main_NoConfigsHint
data.value: No configurations yet. Use the «+ New configuration» button to add a server to the catalogue.

data.name: Main_NoProfilesHint
data.value: Add a profile and a configuration in settings.

data.name: Main_NoProfilesYetHint
data.value: No profiles yet. Use the «+ Profile» button to create one, then set its configuration and routing.

data.name: Main_NoRoutingListsHint
data.value: No lists yet. Click «+ New list» to set rules (geo categories, domains, CIDR, apps).

data.name: Main_NoSourcesHint
data.value: No databases yet. Add geosite/geoip above.

data.name: Main_PerAppRoutingLabel
data.value: ROUTING OF AN APP'S NETWORK REQUESTS

data.name: Main_ProfileNoConfigHint
data.value: This profile has no configuration yet. Pick one from the list, or add it in the «Configurations» section.

data.name: Main_ProfileRenameHint
data.value: A new name for this profile. A running profile cannot be renamed.

data.name: Main_QrUnavailableHint
data.value: The configuration does not fit in a QR code. Use «Save to file…» or the vpn:// link.

data.name: Main_RouteLogHint
data.value: A separate log of routes, address resolutions, and where requests go (routes.log) - to understand why a site does not open or loads slowly. Included in the support archive.

data.name: Main_ServerHostWatermark
data.value: same as on the server, e.g. wss-front.example.com

data.name: Main_ShowQrTooltip
data.value: Show the list's QR code for transfer

data.name: Main_SourceKindTooltip
data.value: The type is detected from the file name in the URL

data.name: Main_SourceRowTooltip
data.value: Right-click or ⋮ — update / delete the database

data.name: Main_SupportLogsHint
data.value: Collect both processes' logs into a single archive (secrets stripped) to send to support.

data.name: Main_UseWebSocketCheckbox
data.value: Use WebSocket (UDP over TCP, bypass UDP blocking)

data.name: Qr_TooLargeHint
data.value: Too large for a QR code - use “Save...” or “Copy”.

data.name: BundleImportVm_PasteOrLoadBundle
data.value: Paste or load the bundle file contents.

data.name: ConfigEditorVm_NotAConfig
data.value: This does not look like a WireGuard/AmneziaWG configuration ([Interface] and [Peer] are required).

data.name: Exclusions_AllLocalSubnetsPresent
data.value: All local subnets are already in the list.

data.name: Exclusions_LocalSubnetsAdded
data.value: Local subnets added: {0}. Review the list and click «Save».

data.name: ExportVm_NotWireGuardConfig
data.value: Doesn't look like a WireGuard/AmneziaWG configuration (needs [Interface] and [Peer]).

data.name: MainCode_ClipboardNoText
data.value: There is no text in the clipboard.

data.name: MainCode_QrNotConfig
data.value: QR recognized, but it is not a configuration

data.name: MainCode_QrNotFound
data.value: No QR code found in the image

data.name: MainVm_ConnectHintNoConfig
data.value: The profile has no configuration — set one in settings

data.name: MainVm_NoticeConnectFailed
data.value: Could not connect - the server did not respond.

data.name: MainVm_NoticeProfileEmpty
data.value: Profile «{0}» is empty - add a configuration.

data.name: RoutingEditor_AddAtLeastOneEntry
data.value: Add at least one entry to save the list.

data.name: RoutingEditor_ImportedRulesNeedName
data.value: Imported rules: {0}. Enter a name to save.

data.name: RoutingEditor_NotARoutingList
data.value: This does not look like a routing list.

data.name: RoutingEditor_PathTooBroad
data.value: Path is too broad — select a specific application folder.

data.name: RoutingEditor_SelectAppOrService
data.value: Select an application or service from the list.

data.name: RoutingEditor_SvchostTooBroad
data.value: svchost.exe is a shared service host and would tunnel a lot of unrelated traffic. Select a service from the list.

data.name: RoutingSettings_AllLocalSubnetsPresent
data.value: All local subnets are already in the list.

data.name: RoutingSettings_LocalSubnetsAdded
data.value: Local subnets added: {0}. Review the list and press «Save».

data.name: ScanCode_QrNotConfig
data.value: QR recognized, but it is not a configuration - continuing…

data.name: ScanVm_AimCameraAtQr
data.value: Point the camera at the QR code…

data.name: Transport_HintBasicAuth
data.value: "Login and password" authorization: the client sends an Authorization: Basic header. On the server, enable verification - wstunnel is started with --restrict-config <yaml>, where the allowed login/password (Authorization) is set. The login/password do NOT have to match the AmneziaWG config.

data.name: Transport_HintCert
data.value: Where fullchain/privkey is the server's existing certificate.

data.name: Transport_HintFirewall
data.value: Open TCP {0} in the firewall. The client will tunnel AmneziaWG UDP into this WebSocket.

data.name: Transport_HintIntro
data.value: On the server: install wstunnel and run it as a service with the command

data.name: Transport_HintTokenAuth
data.value: "Token" authorization: the access token in the URL must EXACTLY match --restrict-http-upgrade-path-prefix on the server (and it also blocks blind scanning).

data.name: Transport_NotWebSocketBlob
data.value: This does not look like WebSocket settings.

data.name: Agent_BundleImportedRenamed
data.value: Imported: {0} configs, {1} routing lists, {2} profiles. Renamed on import: {3}.

data.name: Agent_BundleImportedRenamedMany
data.value: Imported: {0} configs, {1} routing lists, {2} profiles. Renamed on import: several names clashed with existing ones.

data.name: Agent_BundleTooNew
data.value: the file is newer (v{0}); update the app

data.name: Agent_DnsReset
data.value: DNS reset to auto-detect (applies on reconnect)

data.name: Agent_ExportSelectionParseFailed
data.value: could not parse the export selection

data.name: Agent_NotAnAmneziaGeoFile
data.value: this is not an AmneziaGeo file

data.name: Agent_UpToDate
data.value: The current version is up to date.

data.name: Installer_NotDirectRun
data.value:
This is an internal component of the AmneziaGeo installer and does not run on its own.
Run AmneziaGeoSetup.exe - that is the installer.

data.name: InstallerBa_GeoUpToDate
data.value: Geo databases are up to date - no download needed.

data.name: InstallerBa_GeoUpdateFailed
data.value: Failed to update the geo databases ({0}). You can do this later in the application.

data.name: InstallerBa_InstalledButConfigFailed
data.value: Installation complete, but the configuration could not be applied.

data.name: InstallerBa_ReplaceDbPrompt
data.value:
Saved AmneziaGeo settings already exist on this system (state.db).
Replace them with the recommended settings from the installer?
Yes - replace (current settings will be lost). No - keep the current settings.

data.name: InstallerBa_StopAppFailed
data.value: Failed to stop the running AmneziaGeo application. Close it and try again.

data.name: InstallerVm_AlreadyInstalled
data.value: AmneziaGeo is already installed. You can update, repair, or remove it.

data.name: InstallerVm_NewerInstalled
data.value: A newer version is installed. You can roll back to this one or remove it.

data.name: Main_ProfileNeedsConfigHint
data.value: Add a configuration first to create a profile.

data.name: Main_RequiredEmptyWarning
data.value: Required field — changes will not be saved while it is empty.
